scene: Byte in teen form sits at the desk in warm afternoon light, relaxed and ecstatic, gazing toward the Chicago skyline with a contented expression after a long quiet day

subjects.description: Byte as a teen-stage pixel art blob: gangly proportioned limbs, large expressive eyes wide open with a bright ecstatic gleam, rounded body slightly taller and leaner than baby stage, warm color palette
subjects.position: primary foreground, seated at center desk
subjects.action: resting one arm lightly on desk surface, head turned slightly toward the window with a calm satisfied look, not typing but relaxed and content

subjects.description: wooden desk center stage, oversized silver laptop open with glowing screen facing Byte, Chicago skyline visible through simple window to the upper left with warm afternoon golden light streaming in

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette, soft warm tones
lighting: warm golden afternoon sunlight streaming through the Chicago window, casting soft highlights on the desk and Byte
mood: ecstatic and serene — bright eyes, relaxed posture, subtle smile, day off from coding but content
background: wooden trophy shelf mounted on wall above desk with exactly one golden trophy on the left side and exactly one small leafy green plant on the right side with clear spacing between them; exactly one food bowl on the floor to the right of the desk with moderate kibble portions and clear gap from desk legs; no other props
composition: Byte centered at desk, laptop open in front, trophy shelf visible above, food bowl visible on floor to right, Chicago skyline window upper background
